channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pathogenesis & Basic Science
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pathogenesis & Basic Science

item.title: Roxadustat-loaded pH-sensitive Anionic Liposomes Ameliorating Experimental Colitis in Mice: Formulation, Cellular Uptake and In vivo Evaluation.
item.description: Current drug delivery - Roxadustat, an inhibitor of hypoxia-inducible factor prolyl hydroxylase, has therapeutic potential for colitis but is limited clinically by poor water solubility and rapid gastrointestinal absorpti...

item.title: Gegen Qinlian Decoction Mitigates DSS-Induced Acute Colitis and Reinstates Gut Barrier Function in Mice, Correlating with Suppressed IL-33/ST2 Signaling.
item.description: Journal of inflammation research - As a classical prescription documented in the Treatise on Febrile Diseases, Gegen Qinlian Decoction (GGQLD) has been widely utilized for diarrhea and dysentery across history. Modern research indic...

item.title: Preventive Effects of Crataegus monogyna Fruit Extract on Oxidative Damage and Inflammatory Response in a Rat Model of Acetic Acid-Induced Ulcerative Colitis.
item.description: Food science & nutrition - BackgroundUlcerative colitis (UC) is a chronic inflammatory bowel disease associated with oxidative stress and inflammation. Natural products may offer protective effects, though their mechanisms r...

item.title: Exosomes from IL-33-Stimulated Macrophages Regulate Epithelial Barrier Function to Ameliorate TNBS-Induced Colitis in Mice.
item.description: Cells - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) represents a growing global health threat that markedly increases colorectal cancer risk, yet conventional immunosuppressive agents achieve mucosal healing in only ...

item.title: Prenylated p-Coumaric Acid Derivatives Mitigate Neurobehavioral and Neuroinflammatory Alterations Associated with Experimental Colitis.
item.description: International journal of molecular sciences - Inflammatory bowel disease is an inflammatory disorder associated with systemic immune activation, contributing to neuroinflammation, behavioral impairments and disruption of the gut-brain axis. Th...
